title: cardamine forsteri
intro: Cardamine forsteri, also known as Forster's bitter-cress, is a species of flowering plant in the family Brassicaceae. It is native to Australia and has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation and improving digestive health, due to its high content of isothiocyanates and other bioactive compounds. In herbal preparations, the leaves and stems of Cardamine forsteri can be used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
